MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT CERTAIN UNDERWRITERS AT LLOYDS LONDON DENOTED AS SYNDICATE NUMBERS 2623 AND 623 DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT.

Charles A. Danaher, Esq., of Sheppard, Mullin, Richter & Hampton LLP, (213) 620-1780, for Plaintiff, via Zoom.

Kevin F. Kieffer, Esq., of TROUTMAN PEPPER HAMILTON SANDERS LLP, (949) 622-2700, for Defendant, in court.

***After hearing, an order is signed. Defendant's demurrer is overuled in part and sustained in part without leave to amend. See scanned order for complete details.
